faqs.question: How to Invest in HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: You can easily invest in HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your investment objective and risk tolerance

faqs.question: What kind of returns does HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth provide?
faqs.answer: The HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth has been there from 01 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 10.89% since its inception.

faqs.question: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is 0.20% as of 23 Jul 2026...

faqs.question: What is the AUM of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The AUM, short for Assets Under Management of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is ₹11,019.45Cr as of 23 Jul 2026.

faqs.question: How to Redeem HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: If you want to sell your HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

faqs.question: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: You can select either SIP or Lumpsum investment of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth based on your investment objective and risk tolerance.

faqs.question: What is the NAV of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The NAV of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is ₹44.91 as of 22 Jul 2026.

faqs.question: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth?
faqs.answer: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is determined by dividing the market price by its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value per share (BVPS).
